title: Warning Points
description: Warning points is A plugin meant for Fairness, This plugin is meant to keeps everybody accountable. It allows you to moderate your server the way you want it to be moderate.
body:
# WarningPoints
## Description

Warning points is A plugin meant for Fairness Many times we give power to or mods And they sometimes can abuse that power, This plugin is meant for that It keeps everybody accountable. It allows you to moderate your server the way you want it to be moderated without you being there.

### Key Advantages:
- **Standardized Moderation**: Enforce consistent rules without relying on individual moderator judgment.
- **Equal Treatment**: Ensure all players are subject to the same rules and consequences, regardless of status or favoritism.
- 
### Granular Warning System
- Assign specific point values to different types of infractions.
- Set customizable thresholds for automated actions (e.g., mute, kick, or ban).
- Granular control over who can issue, view, or manage warning points.

### Point Decay
- Configure automatic point reduction over time to reward improved behavior.

### Notification System
- Send customizable alerts to players when they receive or lose warning points.
- Notify staff members of significant warning events or when thresholds are reached.

### Profanity and Inappropriate Content Filter
- Maintain a server-specific list of forbidden words or phrases.
- Automatically issue warnings for usage of inappropriate language.


## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/warning points` | View your own warning points |
| `/warning add <player> <amount> [notify:true\|false] [reason]` | Add warning points to a player |
| `/warning remove <player> <amount>` | Remove warning points from a player |
| `/warning reset <player>` | Reset all warning points for a player |
| `/warning view <player>` | View the warning points of a specific player |
| `/warning reload` | Reload the WarningPoints configuration |
| `/warning infractions <player>` | View detailed infraction history for a player |

## Permissions

| Permission | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| `warningpoints.*` | Grants access to all WarningPoints commands |
| `warningpoints.points` | Allows players to view their own warning points |
| `warningpoints.add` | Allows adding warning points |
| `warningpoints.add.<max_points>` | Allows adding warning points up to a specified limit |
| `warningpoints.remove` | Permits removal of warning points |
| `warningpoints.reset` | Allows resetting of all warning points for a player |
| `warningpoints.view` | Enables viewing of other players' warning points |
| `warningpoints.view.self` | Allows viewing own warning points |
| `warningpoints.reload` | Permits reloading of the plugin configuration |
| `warningpoints.infractions` | Allows viewing and management of player infractions |
| `warningpoints.exempt` | Exempts a player from receiving warning points |
| `warningpoints.viewissuer` | Enables viewing of warning point issuer statistics |
